reason: A mixed bag of significant regulatory progress (Crypto.com) countered by critical stability and compliance challenges (stablecoin wobble, sanctions evasion) creates an environment of high uncertainty and potential for rapid price swings. While institutional adoption signals long-term strength, immediate risks warrant caution and observation.
headlines: Trump-linked stablecoin wobbles as WLFI says it's under 'coordinated attack'
Crypto.com wins initial approval for U.S. federally regulated crypto custodian bank
Anthony Pompliano led Procap Financial dips toe into buybacks
